description.en: Farm Tablet v2 — Complete overhaul. Central tablet interface for farm management with sidebar navigation, rich data visualisation and modular app system.
description.de: Farm Tablet v2 – Komplette Überarbeitung. Zentrale Tablet-Oberfläche mit Sidebar-Navigation, reichhaltiger Datenvisualisierung und modularem App-System.
description.fr: Farm Tablet v2 — Refonte complète. Interface tablette centrale avec navigation latérale, visualisation de données avancée et système d'applications modulaire.

helpLine.en: OPENING THE TABLET: Press T (configurable) to open or close the Farm Tablet at any time during gameplay. The key can be changed via the TabletKeybind console command or in the Settings app.
NAVIGATION: The left sidebar contains all app icons. Click any icon to switch apps. Scroll the mouse wheel over the sidebar to scroll if you have many apps installed.

MOVING & RESIZING: While the tablet is open, open the Settings app and click ENTER EDIT MODE. Then drag the tablet body to reposition it, drag corners to scale it, or drag the left/right edges to adjust width. Right-click to exit edit mode. Position is saved automatically.
DASHBOARD: Shows your farm balance (hero card), income/expense summary, field count, vehicle count, current season and time, and a live weather snapshot.
WORKSHOP: Walk within 25m of any vehicle to see its fuel level, wear percentage and operating hours. Click SELECT to pin a vehicle for detailed diagnostics that stay visible as you walk away.
FIELD MANAGER: Lists all fields you own with their crop type, current growth phase badge, and a color-coded state indicator (fallow, seeded, growing, ready to harvest, needs work).
ANIMALS: Shows every animal pen with color-coded progress bars for food level, water level, and cleanliness. Green = good, yellow = attention needed, red = critical.

BUCKET TRACKER: Automatically detects when you are driving a wheel loader, excavator, or material handler and counts dump cycles. Shows a history of loads with material type and estimated weight per dump.
APP STORE: Browse all installed tablet apps. Companion mod apps (Income, Tax, NPC Favor, Crop Stress, Soil Fertilizer) appear here automatically when those mods are active in your savegame.

SETTINGS: Manage display position and scale, toggle sound effects (app-select click, help-panel paging), set the startup app, toggle notifications, and enable debug logging. Use the ENTER EDIT MODE button to drag and resize the tablet visually.
CONSOLE COMMANDS: Type tablet in the developer console (tilde key) for a list of all available commands. Examples: TabletKeybind H, TabletSetStartupApp weather, TabletResetSettings.

text.name: ft_enabled_long
text.en: Enable or disable the farm tablet system

text.name: ft_keybind_long
text.en: Key to open/close the farm tablet

text.name: ft_notifications_long
text.en: Show tablet notifications on game load

text.name: ft_startupapp_long
text.en: Default app when opening the tablet

text.name: ft_soundeffects_long
text.en: Play sound effects for tablet interactions
